name: Moonlit Forest Path
desc: Clean night-forest arena for early story fights.

name: Moonlit Forest Ruins
desc: Ancient forest ruins under the full moon.

name: Mystical Stone Ruins
desc: Moonlit runes, ruined walls, and a clean center lane for duels.

name: Southern Ridge Gate
desc: A mountain path beneath the moon, leading toward the next phase.

name: Valdore Nightmare Forest
desc: Corrupted red forest for Diastre and nightmare battles.

name: Stone Wall Labyrinth
desc: Blue-lit corridor arena with wind banners.

name: Terra Registration Plaza
desc: The bright city plaza where the Badge Trials begin.

name: Kemt Academy Courtyard
desc: Daylight practice arena with weapon racks and target posts.

name: Hovercraft Sky Deck
desc: Sunset deck battle high above the clouds.

name: Dark Esplanade
desc: Diego’s chained nightmare realm made into a battle arena.

name: Purple Torch Hall
desc: Interior hall for rescue and handler fights.

name: Kekku Experiment Lab
desc: Chains, machines, and purple electric arcs.

name: Ruined Laboratory Arena
desc: The aftermath of experiments and rebellion.

name: Hidden Mountain Village
desc: Warm village at twilight beneath the mountains.

name: Malachai Manor Ruins
desc: The ruined training grounds where Rai’s path begins.
